schema.description: The representation of a company's onboarding status
schema.title: Company-Onboarding-Status

onboarding_completed.description: a boolean flag for the company's onboarding status

onboarding_steps.description: a list of company onboarding steps

title.description: The display name of the onboarding step

id.description: The string identifier for each onboarding step

required.description: The boolean flag indicating whether the step is required or optional

completed.description: The boolean flag indicating whether the step is completed or not.

completed_at.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the onboarding step was completed.

skippable.description: The boolean flag indicating whether the step can be skipped or not.

requirements.description: A list of onboarding steps that are required to be completed in order to proceed with the current onboarding step.

schema.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided ID/UUID is valid.

error_key.description: Specifies where the error occurs. Typically this key identifies the attribute/parameter related to the error.

category.description: Specifies the type of error. The category provides error groupings and can be used to build custom error handling in your integration.

message.description: Provides details about the error - generally this message can be surfaced to an end user.

errors.message: The requested resource was not found.

schema.title: Not-Found-Error-Object
